'''bogayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphadenomatous|lymphadenomatous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphadenomatous|lymphadenomatous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bogayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogayithi|bogayithi]] || [[word:bogayiji|bogayiji]] || [[word:bogayishi|bogayishi]] || [[word:bogayiki|bogayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogayuthuthu|bogayuthuthu]] || [[word:bogayujuju|bogayujuju]] || [[word:bogayushushu|bogayushushu]] || [[word:bogayukuku|bogayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogayuthu|bogayuthu]] || [[word:bogayuju|bogayuju]] || [[word:bogayushu|bogayushu]] || [[word:bogayuku|bogayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogayufthuf|bogayufthuf]] || [[word:bogayufjuf|bogayufjuf]] || [[word:bogayufshuf|bogayufshuf]] || [[word:bogayufkuf|bogayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogayethe|bogayethe]] || [[word:bogayeje|bogayeje]] || [[word:bogayeshe|bogayeshe]] || [[word:bogayeke|bogayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogayothotho|bogayothotho]] || [[word:bogayojojo|bogayojojo]] || [[word:bogayoshosho|bogayoshosho]] || [[word:bogayokoko|bogayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogayotho|bogayotho]] || [[word:bogayojo|bogayojo]] || [[word:bogayosho|bogayosho]] || [[word:bogayoko|bogayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogayofthof|bogayofthof]] || [[word:bogayofjof|bogayofjof]] || [[word:bogayofshof|bogayofshof]] || [[word:bogayofkof|bogayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfthÃŸf|bogayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfjÃŸf|bogayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfshÃŸf|bogayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfkÃŸf|bogayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bogayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bogayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bogayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bogayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfthÃŸf|bogayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfjÃŸf|bogayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfshÃŸf|bogayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfkÃŸf|bogayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfthÃŸf|bogayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfjÃŸf|bogayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfshÃŸf|bogayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bogayÃŸfkÃŸf|bogayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bogayÃḊthÃḊ|bogayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bogayÃḊjÃḊ|bogayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bogayÃḊshÃḊ|bogayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bogayÃḊkÃḊ|bogayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bogayathatha|bogayathatha]] || [[word:bogayajaja|bogayajaja]] || [[word:bogayashasha|bogayashasha]] || [[word:bogayakaka|bogayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bogayatha|bogayatha]] || [[word:bogayaja|bogayaja]] || [[word:bogayasha|bogayasha]] || [[word:bogayaka|bogayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bogayafthaf|bogayafthaf]] || [[word:bogayafjaf|bogayafjaf]] || [[word:bogayafshaf|bogayafshaf]] || [[word:bogayafkaf|bogayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bogayasha|bogayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bogayshÃḋasha|bogayshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bogayroasha|bogayroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bogaymuasha|bogaymuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bogayyaasha|bogayyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobogaynkshÃḋasha|gobogaynkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobogaynkroasha|gobogaynkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobogaynkmuasha|gobogaynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobogaynkyaasha|gobogaynkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bogagayasha|bogagayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bogagayshÃḋasha|bogagayshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bogagayroasha|bogagayroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bogagaymuasha|bogagaymuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bogagayyaasha|bogagayyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobogagaynkshÃḋasha|gobogagaynkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobogagaynkroasha|gobogagaynkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobogagaynkmuasha|gobogagaynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobogagaynkyaasha|gobogagaynkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:begÃḊyasha|begÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:begÃḊyshÃḋasha|begÃḊyshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:begÃḊyroasha|begÃḊyroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:begÃḊymuasha|begÃḊymuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:begÃḊyyaasha|begÃḊyyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobegÃḊynkshÃḋasha|gobegÃḊynkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobegÃḊynkroasha|gobegÃḊynkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobegÃḊynkmuasha|gobegÃḊynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobegÃḊynkyaasha|gobegÃḊynkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bogfayasha|bogfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bogfayshÃḋasha|bogfayshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bogfayroasha|bogfayroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bogfaymuasha|bogfaymuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bogfayyaasha|bogfayyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobogfaynkshÃḋasha|gobogfaynkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobogfaynkroasha|gobogfaynkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobogfaynkmuasha|gobogfaynkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobogfaynkyaasha|gobogfaynkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
